sql_array: CREATE TABLE spatial_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, geom GEOMETRY);
INSERT INTO spatial_data (id, geom) VALUES (1, ST_Point(1, 1));
CREATE TABLE data_types (type_id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO data_types (type_id, value) VALUES (1, 'Test'), (2, NULL), (3, '123');
SELECT internal_type(value) AS int_type, bif:st_distance(geom, ST_Point(1, 2)) AS distance FROM spatial_data JOIN data_types ON internal_type(value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, internal_type(NULLIF(value, '')) AS int_type FROM data_types WHERE internal_type(value) > 0 GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;

SELECT d.id, internal_type(d.value) AS type_value, bif:st_distance(s.geom, ST_Point(2, 2)) AS distance FROM spatial_data s JOIN data_types d ON d.type_id = 1 OR internal_type(d.value) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY distance;
SELECT MAX(internal_type(value)) AS max_type FROM data_types GROUP BY internal_type(value);
WITH Distances AS (SELECT id, bif:st_distance(geom, ST_Point(1, 1)) AS distance FROM spatial_data) SELECT id FROM Distances WHERE distance IS NOT NULL AND distance < 100;
SELECT SUBSTRING(CAST(internal_type(value) AS VARCHAR), 1, 2) AS short_type FROM data_types WHERE internal_type(value) IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(value) > 0;
